title: Impermanent Awareness
definition: The recognition that our consciousness is not a fixed entity but an ever-changing process, intertwined with the transient nature of all phenomena.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The recognition that our consciousness is not a fixed entity but an ever-changing process, intertwined with the transient nature of all phenomena.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The recognition that our consciousness is not a fixed entity but an ever-changing process, intertwined with the transient nature of all phenomena.
difficulty_levels.expert: The observation and eventual realization that the observer itself is as impermanent as the observed, leading to the quenching of existential thirst.

extra_fields.insight: The observation and eventual realization that the observer itself is as impermanent as the observed, leading to the quenching of existential thirst.
